metadata.description: A collection of claude code plugins used by SandyKid

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Code review skill that checks for bugs, security issues, and best practices

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Smart git commit assistant: generates elegant commit messages, updates key docs, and manages version bumps

plugins.name: doc-generator
plugins.description: Generate documentation comments for functions, classes, and modules
